description: Configuring automatic retries on all jobs, which converts real intermittent defects into rare green runs and hides regressions.
body: Failure mode: a blanket retry policy is applied so any failing job is rerun until it passes, masking genuine flaky-but-real bugs and nondeterministic defects behind an eventually-green result. Detection signals: jobs that pass only on the 2nd/3rd attempt; retry counts climbing over time; intermittent production bugs that CI 'never catches'. Do not retry indiscriminately to get green. Safer fallback: retry only when evidence points to infrastructure/nondeterminism, quarantine and track confirmed flakes with a tracking issue, and investigate the underlying cause instead of masking it.
